channel.title: Living Room Feng Shui on Feng Shui Guide - Your Complete Resource for Chinese Wisdom
channel.description: Recent content in Living Room Feng Shui on Feng Shui Guide - Your Complete Resource for Chinese Wisdom

item.title: Living Room Feng Shui: Create a Welcoming Space for Harmony and Connection
item.description: Learn how to apply Feng Shui principles to your living room. Discover the best furniture arrangement, colors, and decor tips for a harmonious, welcoming space.
